name: Unnamed Project

entity_types.name: Student
entity_types.description: A student who can participate in social media discussions.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: The full name of the student.

attributes.name: school
attributes.description: The school the student is attending.

entity_types.name: Professor
entity_types.description: An academic or teacher involved in educational institutions.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: The full name of the professor.

attributes.name: university
attributes.description: The university where the professor teaches.

entity_types.name: Journalist
entity_types.description: A professional journalist or reporter covering news and events.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: The full name of the journalist.

attributes.name: media_outlet
attributes.description: The media organization the journalist works for.

entity_types.name: Celebrity
entity_types.description: A well-known public figure with a significant online presence.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: The full name of the celebrity.

attributes.name: fame_reason
attributes.description: The reason for the celebrity's fame.

entity_types.description: A high-ranking business executive or company leader.

attributes.description: The full name of the executive.

attributes.name: company
attributes.description: The company the executive leads.

entity_types.name: Official
entity_types.description: A government official or public servant.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: The full name of the official.

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: The position held by the official.

entity_types.name: Lawyer
entity_types.description: A legal professional providing legal advice or representation.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: The full name of the lawyer.

attributes.name: firm
attributes.description: The law firm the lawyer belongs to.

entity_types.name: Doctor
entity_types.description: A medical professional providing healthcare services.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: The full name of the doctor.

attributes.name: hospital
attributes.description: The hospital where the doctor practices.

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: A general entity representing any individual not covered by specific types.

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: The full name of the person.

attributes.name: location
attributes.description: The location where the person resides.

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: A general entity representing any organization not covered by specific types.

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: The name of the organization.

attributes.name: location
attributes.description: The location of the organization.

edge_types.name: WORKS_FOR
edge_types.description: Indicates an employment relationship between a person and an organization.

edge_types.name: AFFILIATED_WITH
edge_types.description: Indicates an affiliation between a person and an organization.

edge_types.name: REPRESENTS
edge_types.description: Indicates that a person represents an organization or group.

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: Indicates that a journalist reports on a particular subject or event.

edge_types.name: COMMENTS_ON
edge_types.description: Indicates that a person comments on another person or event.

analysis_summary: The text provides a detailed narrative involving various characters, including students, professors, journalists, celebrities, executives, officials, lawyers, and doctors. These individuals are part of different organizations such as universities, companies, government agencies, and hospitals. The relationships among these entities include employment, education, affiliation, representation, reporting, and commenting. Based on this analysis, 10 entity types were defined, with the last two being generic Person and Organization types to cover all other cases.
